context.projectOverview: Bober Vision Tier 3 — Prod-incident agent shape. Sprint 16 adds observability MCP plugin slots; agent-bober becomes an MCP CLIENT consuming external observability servers (logs, metrics, traces, errors) and merges their tools into bober-diagnoser's tool list at spawn time. Generic / BYO design: docs only, no vendor-specific code.

completedSprints.title: bober-diagnoser agent
completedSprints.summary: agents/bober-diagnoser.md created — 244 lines, read-only investigator with DiagnosisResult schema, Iron Law, 6-step Investigation Discipline. Core tools: Read/Bash/Grep/Glob. Sprint 16 will add observability MCP tools at spawn time.
